authors: Wan-Ying Yang Department of Political Science
raw_title: Uneven Echoes: Gender’s Divergent Influence on Candidate Personalization and Voter Response in Taiwan
title_en: Uneven Echoes: Gender’s Divergent Influence on Candidate Personalization and Voter Response in Taiwan
title_zh: 不均衡的回响：性别对台湾候选人个人化与选民反应的差异影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨性别如何影响台湾政治中候选人的个人化表现以及选民的不同反应。研究发现，性别因素会导致候选人在竞选中的个人形象塑造和选民对其的回应方式出现差异。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how gender influences candidate personalization and voter responses in Taiwanese politics. The research finds that gender factors lead to differences in how candidates present themselves during campaigns and how voters react to them.
research_direction_zh: 政治传播中的性别差异研究，关注候选人形象塑造与选民互动的性别维度
research_direction_en: Research on gender differences in political communication, focusing on the gender dimension of candidate image-building and voter interaction
